text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
No... You were so close. Why did the arm have to
shake all of a sudden?

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
N-no, you don't need to apologize. It was
probably my bad luck!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: You worked so hard, but... it's all my fault...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: You worked so hard, but... it's all my fault...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: I'm sorry for being such a burden!
